---
title: "Alex Koeberle"
---

I am a Postdoctoral Associate in the Natural Resources and the Environment 
Section at Cornell University.

I work in fisheries ecology and conservation, and use quantitative techniques
in population ecology and ecosystem science to address fisheries sustainability.
My present research explores fisheries restoration in the Great Lakes from a 
food web perspective.

Before my current position, I completed my PhD in Natural Resources at Cornell
and my MS in Fisheries Science at Oregon State. I earned my BS in Natural 
Resources from Cornell.
